Speaker.rawBytes: EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E4 BC 8A E7 B9 94 20 E9 A0 86 E5 B9 B3
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 B2 B3 E7 BE BD 20 E3 82 86 E3 81 8B E3 82 8A
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E7 9C 9F E7 94 B0 20 E6 98 8E E5 BD A6
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E6 A1 90 E6 9D A1 20 E7 BE 8E E9 B6 B4
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E3 82 B3 E3 83 AD E3 83 9E E3 83 AB
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 A4 A9 E7 94 B0 20 E4 B9 BE
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E3 82 A2 E3 82 A4 E3 82 AE E3 82 B9

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2138 0 0}Hey, hey, can ya hear me? Oh, cool, looks like we're already connected.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}Yo, how goes? It sounds like you guys are on a roll.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 50 0 0}...Ryoji was saying there's no way we could win.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}But the way things are goin', this'll be a cakewalk! Heh, I'm just kiddin', but it'd be sweet, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2133 0 0}Don't worry, man. I'm not takin' it lightly. I'm just bein' confident, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}Better to think you can do it than to think you can't, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2133 0 0}Ha, yeah, fair enough. We're goin' up against a legit monster, aren't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}But still, better to be confident so the nerves don't get the best of us, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Heheh, even after all that doom and gloom about how we're gonna lose, you're not even fazed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}You're somethin' else, man. You might even give me a run for my money over who's MVP![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 50 0 0}Don't get me wrong, I know he was serious when he said we couldn't beat Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}So I'm gonna laugh my ass off when we prove him wrong![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense everyone's strengthened[n]resolve as we head into the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 50 0 0}Alright, people, all the best to ya! If you're in a pinch, you know who to call![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 50 0 0}Good job taking down the Gatekeeper![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 50 0 0}As we get closer to the top, I keep thinking about a lot of things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 50 0 0}I wonder if this is how heroes feel right before the season finale.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7068 0 0}In that sense, it's quite an experience, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 50 0 0}I never expected my daydreams to become reality...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7133 0 0}Haha, sorry. Don't worry, I know that, in their case, they're only acting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 50 0 0}I just thought it might help to think of ourselves as "heroes," or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}Oh, please don't get me wrong. I know it's only fiction.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 50 0 0}I just thought it might help me think more positively if I put myself in a hero's shoes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 50 0 0}You know... heroes aren't strong because they never lose.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 50 0 0}They're strong because they never give up. That's what I think, at least.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense everyone's strengthened[n]resolve as we head into the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 50 0 0}According to Fuuka-san, there are still a lot of Gatekeepers before we reach the top.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 50 0 0}But we'll make it for sure. And I'm ready to go anytime![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4086 0 0}Well done on that victory. Keep up your diligence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}You're approaching the 250th floor. We've come quite a long way...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}It hasn't even been a full year since most of you joined SEES. You've all done wonderfully.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 50 0 0}I can't thank you enough for putting up with everything despite what you've had to go through.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}*chuckle* That's quite generous of you. Thank you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4028 0 0}That's very true. Though it's not a debt I'm sure I'll ever be able to fully repay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4098 0 0}Ramen? Why something so simple? You could always— ...No, you're absolutely right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}We've been fighting this whole time to return to a normal life, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}...Those that we've lost are with us now in spirit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}We will win. Everyone's future is in our hands.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense everyone's strengthened[n]resolve as we head into the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 50 0 0}All right, keep dispatching the Gatekeepers just like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 50 0 0}There are five left, so stay sharp. I'll also be prepared on my end, in case you need me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Just a bit more to the top. Please be carefu— Hm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}Oh, it looks like Koro-chan wants to tell us something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel a strong sense of[n]urgency from Koromaru...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like he's encouraging us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru appears even[n]more motivated now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense everyone's strengthened[n]resolve as we head into the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}*chuckle* All set, Koro-chan? Then let's keep moving![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}Good work with that fight. We should be getting close to the finish line now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}You've fought your fair share of battles at this point.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}Any time you're in a slump, just remember all the blood and sweat you put into this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3130 0 0}Well, I hope it keeps you motivated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3130 0 0}True, you always seem to keep your cool.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}But we all know how much work you've put in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3136 0 0}Hm... Are you saying perseverance alone won't cut it against our opponent?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}Well, that may be true, but I still believe in the skills that we got through that perseverance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}Anyway, bottom line is I don't want to have any regrets.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}I'll do my job to the best of my ability, so you keep it up too, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense everyone's strengthened[n]resolve as we head into the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0_6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 50 0 0}Sorry for interrupting in the middle of your streak. Keep doing what you're doing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 50 0 0}There's no point holding back from here on out, so give it your all! I'm ready too, anytime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 50 0 0}You're doing great! You're almost there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 50 0 0}So, um... I know this goes without saying, but let's make sure we win this, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 50 0 0}It's just... we have so many great memories together, and we should keep making more, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 50 0 0}Oh, sorry, uh... I'm being weird, saying all this stuff out of nowhere, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1132 0 0}Oh, good! I thought maybe I was acting out of character, but I'm glad you're okay with it, haha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1132 0 0}Hey, knock it off! But yeah, it's kinda weird, haha! Still, that's how I feel, so I don't regret saying it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1098 0 0}O-Oh, really? Well, I guess I am this way more when I'm with you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 50 0 0}Anyway... I won't give up until the very end. Actually, no... I won't let there be an end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 50 0 0}So... here's to making more memories, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense everyone's strengthened[n]resolve as we head into the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0_7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 50 0 0}All right, I'll let you get back to it. You're almost there! You got this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6006 0 0}Good job, everyone! Now there's only one more left... You're very close.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 50 0 0}To be honest... I was a little worried.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 50 0 0}I thought my desire for the ones close to me to avoid pain may result in my inability to fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 50 0 0}However, the opposite seems to be the case. I feel a stronger motivation to fight than before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6107 0 0}Oh, so this is courage! I suppose everyone has felt this all this time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6131 0 0}Indeed. But I'm sure you have all felt this ever since you first decided to fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6025 0 0}Yes, please feel free to rely on me anytime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 50 0 0}I will embrace this new feeling and continue to fight alongside everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense everyone's strengthened[n]resolve as we head into the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0_8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 50 0 0}Well, stay safe and good luck. And remember, I am always ready at a moment's notice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}The Gatekeeper's signal just went down![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}We did it! That was the last one![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5144 0 0}I agree. It's been one harsh battle after another...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Yes, you're right. We're almost at our goal...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}But now that the Gatekeepers are out of the way, our path is clear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}...I sense an area with no outer wall a little higher up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}That's probably the place Ryoji-kun was talking about...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Let's go, all of us, together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense everyone's strengthened[n]resolve as we head into the final battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_014_0_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Judgement Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Messiah{f 0 1 27}, the savior![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Please be careful out there. And good luck![n]{f 1 1}
